inputs.label: Measurement Duration
inputs.businessContext: Duration over which the noise level was measured

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration over which the noise level was measured
businessContext_i18n.de: Dauer, über die der Lärmpegel gemessen wurde

inputs.label: Sound Pressure Level
inputs.businessContext: Measured average A-weighted noise level during the measurement period

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured average A-weighted noise level during the measurement period
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ölçüm periyodu sırasında ölçülen ortalama A-ağırlıklı gürültü seviyesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessener mittlerer A-bewerteter Lärmpegel während des Messzeitraums

inputs.label: Exchange Rate
inputs.businessContext: Time-intensity doubling rate (3 dB for ISO, 5 dB for OSHA)

businessContext_i18n.en: Time-intensity doubling rate (3 dB for ISO, 5 dB for OSHA)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zaman-şiddet ikiye katlama oranı (ISO için 3 dB, OSHA için 5 dB).
businessContext_i18n.de: Verdopplungsrate der Zeit-Intensität (3 dB für ISO, 5 dB für OSHA)

inputs.label: Criterion Level
inputs.businessContext: Allowable noise level for an 8-hour exposure

businessContext_i18n.en: Allowable noise level for an 8-hour exposure
businessContext_i18n.tr: 8 saatlik maruziyet için izin verilen gürültü seviyesi

inputs.label: Criterion Time
inputs.businessContext: Reference duration for the criterion level (typically 8 hours)

businessContext_i18n.en: Reference duration for the criterion level (typically 8 hours)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kriter seviyesi için referans süre (genellikle 8 saat)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
